title: Vattakottai Fort
tagline: Vattakottai Fort — heritage city of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Vattakottai Fort (or 'Circular Fort') is a seaside fort near Kanyakumari, Tamil Nadu, at the southern tip of India.
overview.description: Vattakottai Fort (or 'Circular Fort') is a seaside fort near Kanyakumari, Tamil Nadu, at the southern tip of India. It was built in the 18th century as a coastal defence fortification and barracks in the former Travancore kingdom. It was constructed in the 18th century by Punachal/Elakkara Valiyaveetil Marthandan Chempakaraman Pillai for the kings of Travancore. Marthanda Pillai was born in an aristocratic house in Punachal Elakkara near Kuzhikode near Palliyadi in Kanyakumari district.

topPlaces.name: Anjugramam
topPlaces.description: Anjugramam is a panchayat town in Kanniyakumari district in the state of Tamil Nadu, India. Before 1956, Anjugramam was part of Travancore.

topPlaces.name: Mutta Pathi
topPlaces.description: Mutta Pathi (Tamil: முட்ட பதி), is one of the Pancha pathi, which are the primary centers for worship of the Ayyavazhi. This is the third important pilgrim center of Ayyavazhi.

topPlaces.name: Chinnamuttom
topPlaces.description: Chinnamuttom is a special-grade village in Kanyakumari District in the state of Tamil Nadu in India. Chinnamuttom is at the southernmost point of the Indian subcontinent.

topPlaces.name: Azhagappapuram
topPlaces.description: Azhagappapuram is a panchayat town in Kanyakumari district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is located about five miles northwest of Kanyakumari, the southern tip of India.

topPlaces.name: Theerthakkarai
topPlaces.description: Theerthakkarai is a holy place of Ayyavazhi. It is located 0.6 kilometres (0.37 mi) south-east of the main pathi at Muttappathi at the end of the Muttapathi road at the rocky-shores.

topPlaces.name: Muhilankudieruppu
topPlaces.description: Muhilankudieruppu is a village located in Agasteeswaram Taluk, Kanyakumari District, Tamil Nadu, India. Located 4 km from Kanyakumari and 16 km from Nagercoil (capital town of Kanyakumari on the road connecting Kanyakumari with Nagercoil and nearest city Trivandrum (Kerala).

topPlaces.name: Kinnikannanvilai
topPlaces.description: Kinnikannanvilai is a village on the west coast of Kanyakumari, Tamil Nadu, India, flanked by Muhilankudieruppu in the south and Kovilvilai in the north. Kinnikannanvilai is bound by Puviyoor in the east and Arabian Sea in the west.

topPlaces.name: Our Lady of Ransom Church, Kanyakumari
topPlaces.description: Our Lady of Ransom Church is a Catholic church located at Kanyakumari, Tamil Nadu, India.

image.alt: Our Lady of Ransom Church, Kanyakumari

Theerthakkarai is a holy place of Ayyavazhi. It is located 0.6 kilometres (0.37 mi) south-east of the main pathi at Muttappathi at the end of the Muttapathi road at the rocky-shores.

Muhilankudieruppu is a village located in Agasteeswaram Taluk, Kanyakumari District, Tamil Nadu, India. Located 4 km from Kanyakumari and 16 km from Nagercoil (capital town of Kanyakumari on the road connecting Kanyakumari with Nagercoil and nearest city Trivandrum (Kerala).

Kinnikannanvilai is a village on the west coast of Kanyakumari, Tamil Nadu, India, flanked by Muhilankudieruppu in the south and Kovilvilai in the north. Kinnikannanvilai is bound by Puviyoor in the east and Arabian Sea in the west.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Vattakottai Fort?
faq.a: The best time to visit Vattakottai Fort is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Vattakottai Fort?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Thiruvananthapuram International Airport (81 km) and the nearest railway station is Thiruvananthapuram Central (79 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Vattakottai Fort?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Vattakottai Fort at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Vattakottai Fort?
faq.a: Stays in Vattakottai Fort start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Vattakottai Fort?
faq.a: The top attractions are Anjugramam, Mutta Pathi, Chinnamuttom, Azhagappapuram, Theerthakkarai.
